title: ExtractedChange
description: One classified regulatory change produced by Agent A (classified_changes.json) and refined by Agent B (change_register.json).

classified_id.description: Unique identifier assigned by Agent A (e.g. CLS-001)

source_section.description: Section header from the source regulation (e.g. Section 4.2 - KYC Review Frequency)

page_estimate.description: Estimated page number in source document (~3000 chars per page for TXT)

text.description: The extracted regulatory sentence or clause — body only, no section header

change_type.description: Heuristic classification of the change based on keyword patterns

content_hash.description: SHA-256 prefix (12 chars) of the text field — used for deduplication and tamper detection

confidence.description: Extraction confidence score added by Agent B (absent in Agent A output)

ambiguous.description: True if Agent B flagged this change for legal review due to ambiguous language
